name: Oil and Gas Owner Revenue Check Stub

operatorName.description: the operator / payor company name (e.g. 'Samson Exploration, LLC')

checkNumber.description: the revenue check number if printed

checkDate.description: the revenue check date in YYYY-MM-DD if printed

ownerNumber.description: the owner identification number if printed

lineItems.description: one entry per property+product revenue detail block

propertyName.description: the property name (e.g. 'ALEXANDER NO 3 OIL UNIT #3')

countyName.description: the county where the property is located (e.g. 'Orange')

unitPrice.description: the unit price (gross value divided by volume) (e.g. 102.464)

btu.description: the heating value of gas in thousand BTU per cubic foot (e.g. 1.301)

ownerVolume.description: this owner's share of the volume sold (e.g. 37.82)

ownerGrossValue.description: this owner's share of gross value in dollars (e.g. 3874.61)

ownerTax.description: this owner's share of tax in dollars (e.g. 236.20)

ownerDeducts.description: this owner's share of deductions in dollars (e.g. 13.05)

ownerNetValue.description: this owner's net value in dollars after tax and deductions (e.g. 3638.41)

ownerTotalGrossValue.description: owner total gross value across all lines (e.g. 4390.26)

ownerTotalTax.description: owner total tax across all lines (e.g. 282.94)

ownerTotalDeducts.description: owner total deductions across all lines (e.g. 44.98)

ownerTotalNetValue.description: owner total net value across all lines (e.g. 4062.34)
